title: Week 11 Review
html:
Congratulations on completing week eleven! After finishing your lessons you should now know:

  • 9 new kanji
  • 12 new words in katakana
  • Use of verb in normal form + し、verb in normal form + し、…  to say “and besides”, “because A and B”, use verb in ます form+ながら + another verb in ます form to express doing two things simultaneously, and use of noun + という + noun, to say “called”, “named”
  • Use of the verb in て form + おきます　to express doing something in advance or leaving something undone, and use of もう+verb in て form + あります。to express a preparation done in advance and completed.
  • Use of verb in て form + verb in ます to express a sequence of actions, use of verb in ない form + で + verb in ます to express an alternative, and use of verb in て form + しまいました to express regret of something done.
  • How to use 5 new grammar points:
    • Grammar focus on the use of 一生懸命 and それに
    • Grammar focus on ながら and ゆっくり
    • Grammar focus in 十分, いよいよ, そのほかに
    • Grammar focus on the use of って
    • Grammar focus on the use of で with quantitative limit
    • Grammar focus on the use of さっき
If you have any questions on what you have learned this week, don’t forget that you can always ask for more help in the student community!
